title: Mobile header component with project/session controls and theme toggle
purpose: Provides a compact mobile-friendly header with project and session dropdowns, refresh button, theme toggle, and connection status indicators.
module_context: Exports a MobileHeader React component that renders a responsive header with icon-only controls for mobile viewports, including project/session selectors, refresh, agent chat toggle, theme switcher, and connection status badge.

methods.name: getPhaseColor
methods.normalized_params: (state: string | undefined, displayName: string | undefined): string

steps.content: Determine color class based on state string prefix matches for various workflow phases.
IF state matches specific phase patterns, return corresponding color classes for that phase.
ELSE if displayName contains keywords related to workflow stages, return matching color classes.
IF no matches found, return default gray color classes.
Initialize theme and session state using custom hooks.
Set up dropdown open states and refs for project and session selectors.
Compute unique projects from sessions and registered projects.
Filter sessions by selected project for display in session dropdown.
Synchronize selected project with current session project on mount.
Auto-select first project if none is currently selected.
Add event listeners for clicking outside dropdowns and pressing escape key.
Render the header with logo, project selector, session selector, refresh button, agent chat toggle, theme toggle, status badge, and connection indicator.
Update selected project state to the chosen project.
Close the project dropdown menu.
Find sessions belonging to the selected project.
IF sessions exist for the project, select the first one.
ELSE if current session project differs from selected project, clear the session selection.
Invoke the session selection callback with the clicked session.
Close the session dropdown menu.
Toggle the current theme using the theme hook.
Toggle the visibility of the agent chat panel.
Trigger the refresh sessions callback to update session list.
Close the project dropdown menu.
Trigger the add project callback to create a new project.
Stop event propagation to prevent dropdown closing.
Confirm project removal with user.
IF confirmed, invoke the remove project callback.
IF the removed project was selected, clear the selected project state.
Close the session dropdown menu.
IF a project is selected, trigger the create session callback with that project.
Stop event propagation to prevent dropdown closing.
Confirm session deletion with user.
IF confirmed, invoke the delete session callback with the session.
Extract the last part of the project path as the display name.
